title: Chore: Add security headers
original_text: Added security headers to all HTTP responses. Implemented Content-Security-Policy to prevent XSS. Added X-Frame-Options to prevent clickjacking. Added X-Content-Type-Options to prevent MIME sniffing. Added Strict-Transport-Security for HTTPS enforcement. Added Referrer-Policy for privacy. Updated web server configuration. Result: security headers deployed.
expected_subject: chore(security): add security headers to HTTP responses
expected_body_lines: - Add X-Content-Type-Options to prevent MIME sniffing
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(security): add security headers to HTTP responses"
